ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fiscal year (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the fiscal year */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the fiscal year was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the fiscal year */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the fiscal year was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_categories" (
  "account_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account category */,
  "account_category" TEXT /* Name of the account category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the category */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account */,
  "parent_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., current, non-current) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the account */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the transaction belongs to */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Fiscal year the transaction occurred in */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., debit, credit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the transaction */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Fiscal year the financial statement belongs to */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., balance sheet, income statement) */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date the financial statement was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial statement (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "is_versioned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the statement is versioned */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the statement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the statement was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the statement */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the statement was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balance_sheets" (
  "balance_sheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance sheet entry */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the balance sheet entry belongs to */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the balance sheet entry belongs to */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the balance sheet entry */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., current, non-current) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the balance sheet entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the balance sheet entry was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the balance sheet entry */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the balance sheet entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_sheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balance_sheets_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_statements" (
  "income_statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income statement entry */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the income statement entry belongs to */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the income statement entry belongs to */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the income statement entry */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., revenue, expense) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the income statement entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the income statement entry was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the income statement entry */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the income statement entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_statements_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cash_flow_statements" (
  "cash_flow_statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cash flow statement entry */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the cash flow statement entry belongs to */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the cash flow statement entry belongs to */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the cash flow statement entry */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., operating, investing, financing) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the cash flow statement entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the cash flow statement entry was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the cash flow statement entry */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the cash flow statement entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cash_flow_statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cash_flow_statements_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, accountant, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user account */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing financial data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when financial data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is private */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the annotation belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the annotation is private */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sharing_logs" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing event */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the financial statement */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date the financial statement was shared */,
  "shared_with_users" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of user IDs the statement was shared with */,
  "shared_with_emails" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of email addresses the statement was shared with */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sharing log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the sharing log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sharing_logs_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the audit trail entry belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "audit_trail_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "audit_trail_text" TEXT /* Text describing the change */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the audit trail */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit trail was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)
